requestedAction: Create or connect one dedicated Netlify staging-only site for gurnoorbassi/ag-social-media-management-system and deploy from main.
scope: This approval package, if converted into an active approved lock, allows AG OS to use Netlify for exactly one future staging-only deployment milestone for gurnoorbassi/ag-social-media-management-system. The allowed future actions are limited to creating or connecting one dedicated Netlify staging-only site named ag-social-media-management-system-staging, deploying from main at commit d3fcd8c6435433169686c2ec404a5f00c6cc62bd, verifying the staging URL returns HTTP 200, recording the Netlify deployment result, and stopping before production, custom domain, DNS, paid features, secrets, social account connection, social credentials, posting, scheduling, n8n activation, real client data, Lead Gen, AI Receptionist, or Constitution changes.
revocationPath: This approval is revoked, expired, cancelled, or invalidated when the owner says stop or revoke, the expiration passes, the target repository changes, the target branch changes, the target main SHA changes without renewed approval, the Netlify site name changes, a custom domain or DNS change is needed, a paid Netlify feature is required, credentials or secrets would need to be stored in the repository, social credentials or account connections become necessary, posting or scheduling becomes necessary, n8n activation becomes necessary, validation or boot check fails, target repo checks fail, Netlify reports a configuration or billing blocker, an incident opens for this scope, any prohibited action becomes necessary, or the action expands beyond one dedicated staging-only Netlify deployment.

evidence.reference: Current thread owner instruction requested an approval package only for Netlify staging deployment of gurnoorbassi/ag-social-media-management-system.
npm.cmd run validate, npm.cmd run boot:check, and node --test tests/*.test.mjs must pass immediately before execution.
